source_document: TRANSNET NATIONAL PORTS AUTHORITY Tariff Book April 2024 to March 2025 Twenty Third Edition

rules.name: Light Dues
rules.notes: Rate for 'All other vessels', charged per 100 GT or part thereof. This is a general rate, not specific to Durban, and applies once per SA port call, valid for 60 days or until departing the last SA port.

rules.name: Port Dues
rules.notes: General rate for vessels entering the port, charged as a basic fee per 100 GT plus an incremental fee per 100 GT per 24-hour period or part thereof.

rules.name: Towage Dues
rules.notes: Rates for Durban, based on vessel's gross tonnage, with a tiered structure of base fees and incremental charges per 100 GT for tonnage above the band's lower threshold. Charged per service (entry and exit).

rules.name: VTS Dues
rules.notes: Rate specific to Durban and Saldanha Bay, charged per Gross Tonnage per port call, with a minimum fee.

rules.name: Pilotage Dues
rules.notes: Rates for Durban, charged as a basic fee per service plus an incremental fee per 100 GT or part thereof. Charged per service (entry and exit).

rules.name: Running of Vessel Lines
rules.notes: Rates from the 'Other Ports' column under Berthing Services, as Durban is not explicitly listed. Charged as a basic fee per service plus an incremental fee per 100 GT or part thereof. Charged per service (entry and exit).
